issues.title: push_idempotency anon RLS bypass — emergency push suppression vector
issues.description: Anon role with the published key can SELECT/INSERT/DELETE on public.push_idempotency (323 rows visible at probe time). Migration 20260421103838_push_idempotency_table.sql creates the table without ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY and without any CREATE POLICY. Enables emergency-push suppression: an attacker pre-claims an idempotency key for an expected SOS or force-ring, causing push-notify to short-circuit with duplicate:true on the real call. On a children-safety product this prevents emergency notifications from reaching the parent.
issues.fix_hint: ALTER TABLE public.push_idempotency ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY service_only ON public.push_idempotency USING (false) WITH CHECK (false); REVOKE ALL ON public.push_idempotency FROM anon, authenticated. Add CI assertion that probes anon access on every deploy.

issues.title: push_sent anon RLS bypass — production state drifted from migration
issues.description: Migration for push_sent declares ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + USING (false), but production state has drifted: anon SELECT/INSERT/DELETE all return 2xx (182 rows visible). Same suppression vector as QA-001: pre-insert dedup rows to silence timed reminders. Family-activity enumeration also leaks via family_id + action columns.
issues.file: production state vs supabase/migrations/ (migration declares RLS, prod lost it)
issues.fix_hint: Re-apply RLS in a new migration (idempotent ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + DROP POLICY IF EXISTS + CREATE POLICY USING(false)). Assert via anon probe before deploy. Add CI guard that fails if any RLS-required table is unprotected in prod.

issues.title: Android lint: NewApi (API 26) + UnspecifiedRegisterReceiverFlag in ForceRingActivity
issues.description: android/gradlew.bat :app:lintDebug FAILED with 2 errors. (1) ForceRingActivity.java:64 calls KeyguardManager#requestDismissKeyguard which requires API 26 but minSdk=24 [NewApi]. (2) ForceRingActivity.java:159 registers stopReceiver for com.hyeni.calendar.FORCE_RING_STOP without RECEIVER_EXPORTED or RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED flag — required on Android 14+ targets. APK still builds; these manifest at runtime on lower-API devices or higher-API receiver scenarios.
issues.fix_hint: Wrap requestDismissKeyguard in Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= O guard (or @TargetApi(26)); ContextCompat.registerReceiver(..., RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED) for the stopReceiver.

issues.title: Playwright critical-flows.spec.js: 24/60 fail (test-vs-UI selector drift)
issues.description:
Commit d5d183f promoted the parent emergency-alert popup to a full alertdialog with its own

긴급 알림

heading (original tile
긴급 알림
retained), causing 22 tests to fail Playwright strict mode on duplicate getByText match. Commit a4b5795 hid the 학부모 모드 chip via .hyeni-top-header--parent-compact .hyeni-top-header-mode-rail{display:none}, breaking 2 more tests that asserted chip visibility. UI is correct; tests are stale. Real-services suite 43/43 PASS confirms runtime is healthy.
issues.fix_hint: Replace getByText('긴급 알림') with getByRole('heading', { name: '긴급 알림' }) or .first(). Drop getByText('학부모 모드') assertion (parent role is implicit in compact header).

issues.title: subscription-reconcile Edge Function lacks JWT verification
issues.description: POST handler opens a service-role Supabase client and fans out to up to 100 stale subscriptions per call without any auth gate. Denial-of-wallet vector on Qonversion API and DB writes; any unauthenticated caller with the function URL can trigger reconciliation loops.
issues.fix_hint: Add getClaims() verify-jwt gate at function entry; require service_role for cron-style invocations. Alternative: enable verify_jwt in supabase config (deno.json or supabase/config.toml functions section).

issues.title: ai-voice-parse Edge Function accepts unauthenticated callers (OpenAI gpt-4o cost abuse)
issues.description: No getClaims() check; body is forwarded to OpenAI chat/completions. Image mode escalates to gpt-4o. Anyone with the function URL can burn the project's OPENAI_API_KEY credits and run free image inference relay through the operator's account.
issues.fix_hint: Add getClaims() JWT check; add per-family rate limit (e.g. 30/hr); restrict CORS to production domain.

issues.title: feedback-email Edge Function unauthenticated + leaks operator inbox
issues.description: POST without JWT/HMAC; default FEEDBACK_TO_EMAIL hardcoded to operator personal address. Attacker can spam/phish operator inbox and discover the hardcoded recipient.
issues.fix_hint: Add getClaims() JWT check + per-user rate limit (e.g. 5/hr); remove hardcoded operator-email fallback (require env var); restrict CORS.

issues.title: Child can self-mutate family_members.role to 'parent' via PATCH
issues.description: fm_upd policy USING/WITH CHECK = (user_id = auth.uid()) has no column-level restriction. role text column has no CHECK constraint. Authenticated child can PATCH /rest/v1/family_members?id=eq.<own> with {role:'parent'} and server accepts. Escalation does NOT grant events write (is_primary_parent uses families.parent_id only) but DOES grant subscriptions write (tier bypass), force_ring trigger, child-photos storage write, daily_supplies write, add_sticker parent branch, and fm_del via is_family_parent.
issues.fix_hint: Add BEFORE UPDATE trigger on family_members raising on role change; OR rewrite fm_upd WITH CHECK to (role = (SELECT role FROM family_members fm0 WHERE fm0.id = family_members.id)); add CHECK constraint role IN ('parent','child').

issues.title: Pair-code per-user rate limit defeated by unlimited anonymous signups
issues.description: pair_attempts rate limit (10/hr) is keyed on user_id. signInAnonymously is open without captcha, so attacker spawns fresh anon sessions per attempt and horizontally scales past the limit. 32-bit entropy keeps practical risk low (~1 in 430k per try at ~10k family scale) but defense is theoretical without IP-based limit.
issues.fix_hint: Add IP-based rate limit via Edge Function wrapper around join_family RPC; bump pair code to 12 chars (48 bits); OR require captcha on signInAnonymously.

issues.title: Push body for edit_event renders 0-indexed month (off-by-one)
issues.description: App.jsx:4089 builds push message body by replacing '-' with '/' in messageDateKey. messageDateKey month is 0-indexed (currentMonth = today.getMonth()), so May 13 renders as '2026/4/13'. Saved data unaffected; user-facing notification copy mislabels month — confusing on a family-scheduling product.
issues.fix_hint: Split messageDateKey by '-', render as ${y}/${m+1}/${d} or ${m+1}월 ${d}일. Audit any other path consuming raw dateKey for display.

issues.title: saveEventWithChildren is non-atomic; partial failure desyncs events_children
issues.description: Sequence is (1) upsert events, (2) delete all events_children for event_id, (3) insert new events_children rows. Each call is a separate REST request with no transaction. If step 3 fails (network glitch, RLS rejection), step 1+2 commit and the event ends up with no children — disappears from every child's filter because is_family_event=false and child_ids=[].
issues.fix_hint: Wrap in a SECURITY DEFINER RPC (single transaction). Fallback: set is_family_event=true when childIds.length===0 to avoid the 'invisible event' failure mode.

issues.title: Kakao REST key bundled in client + cached in SharedPreferences
issues.description: VITE_KAKAO_REST_KEY (backend mobility/affiliate key) is embedded literally in dist/assets/index-DxioK-gY.js and cached in LocationService SharedPreferences (line 209). allowBackup=true exposes the latter via adb backup. Domain/package restriction in Kakao console is not statically verifiable.
issues.fix_hint: Move Kakao REST key server-side (Edge Function proxy). Strip cached copy from SharedPreferences. Confirm Kakao console domain/package restriction with screenshot evidence.

issues.title: unpair_child RPC does not purge location_history
issues.description: Cascade deletes child_locations, fcm_tokens, push_subscriptions, pending_notifications, child_audio_chunks — but omits location_history. Former child's coordinate trail persists indefinitely after unpair on a children-safety product. Compounds with no retention/TTL (QA-P3-05).
issues.fix_hint: Extend unpair_child to DELETE FROM location_history WHERE user_id = p_child_user_id AND family_id = (...).

issues.title: upsert_child_location RPC accepts out-of-range lat/lng
issues.description: Anon probe with lat=999.9 lng=-999.9 reached FK check (only stopped by FK violation, not by range check). Server-side validation absent; client-side Number.isFinite gate is the only check. Garbage data can land in child_locations if FK passes.
issues.fix_hint: Add CHECK (lat BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND lng BETWEEN -180 AND 180) to child_locations table; assert in upsert_child_location SQL with RAISE EXCEPTION.

issues.title: record_location_history_rows GRANTed to anon without lat/lng validation
issues.description: 20260506020000 grants EXECUTE TO anon. RPC returns 204 on authz fail (CONTINUE skip) so anon cannot see whether write succeeded, but the GRANT is broader than needed and there is no lat/lng range check inside.
issues.fix_hint: REVOKE EXECUTE ON FUNCTION record_location_history_rows FROM anon; add lat/lng range assertion in function body.

issues.title: android:allowBackup=true exposes JWT + coords + supabaseKey + fcmToken via adb backup
issues.description: AmbientListenService and LocationService store accessToken/supabaseKey/fcmToken in SharedPreferences with MODE_PRIVATE. LocationService also persists last coordinates for ShutdownReceiver replay. allowBackup=true on a debuggable device extracts plaintext.
issues.fix_hint: Set android:allowBackup=false in AndroidManifest.xml; OR migrate SharedPreferences to EncryptedSharedPreferences + add res/xml/backup_rules.xml excluding hyeni_location_prefs.

issues.title: get_pending_notifications RPC anon-callable with no internal auth check
issues.description: 20260314000002_native_push_support.sql L44-60 + L95 GRANT EXECUTE TO anon. SECURITY DEFINER function filters only on p_family_id arg. Any anon caller with a family_id UUID can SELECT id/title/body/data jsonb/created_at of every undelivered pending notification (1-day expires_at). Leaks child names, event titles, urgent/severity/alertType, requesterUserId.
issues.fix_hint: Wrap function body with IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_members WHERE family_id = p_family_id AND user_id = auth.uid()) THEN RETURN; END IF; OR REVOKE EXECUTE FROM anon and rely on FCM-only delivery.

issues.title: Realtime missed-event recovery gap on reconnect
issues.description: CHANNEL_ERROR -> SUBSCRIBED reconnect does not trigger a re-fetch. Polling fallback covers only 3 of 9 tables (events, memos, saved_places). 6 tables miss the safety net: memo_replies, academies, daily_supplies, child_locations, family_members, family_subscription, danger_zones.
issues.fix_hint: On Realtime subscribe success after CHANNEL_ERROR, trigger fetchEvents/fetchMemos/fetchMemoReplies for current dateKey window. Add the missing 6 tables to the 30s polling loop.

issues.title: fetchEvents unbounded payload (no .range(), no date filter)
issues.description: fetchEvents queries all events for the family with no pagination and no date constraint. Payload grows linearly with family age; multi-year families on cold-launch will see seconds-long JSON parse stalls. SELECT * also fetches every column.
issues.fix_hint: Add date filter (start_date >= now()-90d AND start_date < now()+180d) and .range(0, 499). Replace SELECT * with explicit column list.

issues.title: No offline detection, no mutation queue
issues.description: No navigator.onLine / @capacitor/network listener anywhere in src/. Optimistic update + rollback present for events, but failed mutation surfaces a toast and asks user to retry manually. Subway/elevator/commute scenarios silently drop user edits.
issues.fix_hint: Add @capacitor/network listener (web fallback: navigator.onLine + window 'online'/'offline'). Queue failed mutations in IndexedDB and replay on reconnect with idempotency keys.

issues.title: Main JS bundle 1.22 MB (374 KB gzip) — exceeds Vite 500 KB warning
issues.description: dist/assets/index-DxioK-gY.js is a single 1.22 MB chunk; cold-load performance concern on mid/low-end Android.
issues.fix_hint: manualChunks split: kakao maps, supabase, qonversion, react-vendor.

issues.title: Android lint: 54 warnings (BatteryLife / UnusedAttribute / InlinedApi)
issues.description: Notables: REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS may violate Play Store content policy if not justified; turnScreenOn/showWhenLocked target 27+ but minSdk=24.
issues.fix_hint: Document Play Console justification for REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS; bump minSdk for showWhenLocked or remove.

issues.title: Realtime publication coverage NOT_VERIFIED for location_history/remote_listen_sessions/sos_events
issues.description: No ALTER PUBLICATION add migration for these tables. Acceptable if no client subscribes via postgres_changes; cannot verify statically.
issues.fix_hint: Run SELECT pubname, tablename FROM pg_publication_tables WHERE pubname='supabase_realtime' on prod and assert expected set.

issues.title: QONVERSION_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_WEBHOOKS env override silently disables signature check
issues.description: qonversion-webhook/index.ts:23 — if env=1, signature verification is bypassed. Cannot read function env via anon. Marked NOT_VERIFIED.
issues.fix_hint: Remove the env override entirely or log a warning + require an explicit allowlist of source IPs when set.

issues.title: Four post-Phase-1 migrations missing paired down files
issues.description: 20260423090000_daily_supplies, 20260424000000_join_family_as_parent_rpc, 20260429160000_rls_returning_visibility, 20260511000000_memo_replies_add_child_id. Convention violation per supabase/migrations/down/README.md Rule 1. None destructive — operational debt only.
issues.fix_hint: Add inverse down/*.sql files for each (DROP, REVOKE, ALTER).

issues.title: CORS Allow-Origin: * on unauthenticated Edge Functions
issues.description: ai-voice-parse, feedback-email allow any origin. Restrict to production domains.
issues.fix_hint: CORS_HEADERS['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = 'https://app.hyeni.com' (and Capacitor https://localhost).

issues.title: mark_memo_read RPC executable by anon (no exploit, surface noise)
issues.description: Anon POST to /rpc/mark_memo_read returns 204. Underlying memos UPDATE RLS prevents arbitrary memo mutation so no exploit, but unnecessary attack surface.
issues.fix_hint: REVOKE EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.mark_memo_read(uuid, text, uuid) FROM anon.

issues.title: getMyFamily exposes pair_code to every family member including children
issues.description: src/lib/auth.js:518,562 returns pairCode in the payload to all members. A child device dump (rooted phone, malicious sibling) reveals the live pair code allowing third party to join.
issues.fix_hint: Conditionally include pair_code only when membership.role === 'parent'; surface a manual reveal in parent UI if needed.

issues.title: 30s polling fallback omits memo_replies
issues.description: App.jsx:2412 30-second poll covers events + memos + saved_places. memo_replies relies on 1s memo-page-open poll only. Memo page closed + realtime drop = stale until user reopens memo page.
issues.fix_hint: Add fetchMemoRepliesForDateKeys for the current dateKey window to the 30s loop.

issues.title: events_children INSERT policy lacks family-scope check on child_id
issues.description: RLS WITH CHECK validates event_id is in caller's family events, but does not validate child_id is in caller's family_members. No current UX exploit but defense-in-depth gap.
issues.fix_hint: Extend WITH CHECK to require child_id IN (SELECT id FROM family_members WHERE family_id = (SELECT family_id FROM events WHERE id = event_id)).

issues.title: GRANT ALL ON daily_supplies TO anon (inconsistent grant; RLS blocks)
issues.description: Grant exposes all DML to anon. RLS blocks because auth.uid() is null, but the grant is broader than other tables.
issues.fix_hint: REVOKE ALL ON daily_supplies FROM anon; GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON daily_supplies TO authenticated.

issues.title: Self-user INSERT skip drops memos for multi-device same-user
issues.description: onMemoRepliesChange handler skips when newRow.user_id === authUser.id. Same user on two devices (co-parent on phone + tablet) means device B misses realtime; only the 1s memo-page poll recovers.
issues.fix_hint: Replace self-skip with device-id check (sender_device_id in broadcast payload) OR rely on existing id dedup at line 2009.

issues.title: ShutdownReceiver posts to non-existent /rest/v1/locations table
issues.description: ShutdownReceiver.java:79 posts last coords to /rest/v1/locations (which does not exist; correct path is /rest/v1/child_locations or RPC).
issues.fix_hint: Repoint to /rpc/upsert_child_location with proper payload.

issues.title: push-notify has no global rate limit
issues.description: Only force_ring has quota (1/10 per day). Instant push (kkuk, parent_alert, sos, new_event, remote_listen) relies on idempotency dedup. An authenticated member could spam pushes in their family.
issues.fix_hint: Add token-bucket rate limit per (user_id, action) keyed in a small Postgres table.

issues.title: push-notify has no body-size cap on instant title/message
issues.description: Only force_ring truncates message to 80 chars. FCM 4KB hard cap caps blast radius but oversized payload causes failed sends.
issues.fix_hint: Truncate title to 64 chars and body to 256 chars before FCM dispatch.

issues.title: push-notify returns raw error strings on 500 paths
issues.description: L493 String(err) and L623 insertErr.message exposed to client. Low risk but pg error text may leak schema hints.
issues.fix_hint: Return generic 'internal_error' to client; log full error server-side only.

issues.title: remote_listen_sessions ended_at/duration_ms client-side only
issues.description: Client crash leaves an open audit row indefinitely; UX/audit-integrity bug.
issues.fix_hint: Add a server-side timeout (cron sweeps rows older than 30 min and sets ended_at = created_at + max_duration).

issues.title: kkuk_check_cooldown depends on sos_events insert success
issues.description: If audit row insert fails after dispatch, cooldown won't gate retries. Acceptable for emergency but worth tracking.
issues.fix_hint: Insert cooldown row in a separate atomic step before dispatch.

issues.title: Strong red (#EF4444) selectable as child theme accent — collides with SOS affordance
issues.description: Memory rule design_color_rules.md restricts saturated red to SOS/긴급/하트. Theme palette still exposes #EF4444 ('빨강') as per-child accent. Selecting it propagates strong red to chips, hero rail, card borders, map markers.
issues.fix_hint: Remove #EF4444 from selectable palette; swap to softer rose like #FF6B9B.

issues.title: 320x568 role-select CTA title wraps mid-word
issues.description: On the smallest supported viewport, role card titles wrap to two lines ('부모로 시 / 작'), looking broken on the first-impression screen. Mascot illustration consumes too much horizontal space.
issues.fix_hint: On viewports under 360px switch role card to vertical (illustration above title), reduce mascot size, or shorten copy to '부모' / '자녀'.

issues.title: Splash emphasis fails WCAG AA large-text contrast (2.54 < 3.0)
issues.description: --brand-rose on cream page background falls below 3.0 WCAG AA large-text minimum. Decorative emphasis only but a measurable AA miss.
issues.fix_hint: Use --brand-rose-deep (#D94F7F) for emphasis text or pair the color with weight/underline.

issues.title: Release builds minifyEnabled=false (ProGuard not applied)
issues.description: Java source ships in clear. Enable R8 + shrinkResources for release variant.
issues.fix_hint: Set minifyEnabled true + shrinkResources true on release buildType; verify ProGuard rules cover Capacitor + reflection-heavy classes.

issues.title: No Sentry / equivalent — production crashes invisible
issues.description: Production crashes / unhandled promise rejections invisible to operators. Feedback-email is the only signal.
issues.fix_hint: Add Sentry (or equivalent) SDK; route window 'error' + 'unhandledrejection' to it.

issues.title: Error boundary leaks full stack trace to end users
issues.description: src/main.jsx:38-41 shows full stack to end users. Privacy + UX issue.
issues.fix_hint: Render only a friendly message + a 'send feedback' CTA; log full stack to monitoring only.

issues.title: 27 console.log() calls remaining in production src/
issues.description: console.log present in src/App.jsx (6), src/lib/pushNotifications.js (7), src/lib/sync.js (6), src/lib/nativeLocationService.js (5), and 3 other files. No secrets in scanned strings.
issues.fix_hint: Add esbuild.drop:['console'] in vite.config production target.

issues.title: Gradle deprecation warnings (incompatible with Gradle 9.0)
issues.description: Both assembleDebug and test runs warn 'Deprecated Gradle features were used in this build, making it incompatible with Gradle 9.0.'
issues.fix_hint: Run gradle build --warning-mode all; address per-plugin.

issues.title: Cross-timezone parent/child see dateKey mismatch
issues.description: dateKey is device-local. Parent in KST and child in EST will compute different dateKey for same UTC moment near midnight.
issues.fix_hint: Out-of-scope for v1.0 (Asia/Seoul product). v1.1+: standardize on Asia/Seoul-derived dateKey via Intl.DateTimeFormat.

issues.title: No DB-level lat/lng CHECK on five tables
issues.description: child_locations, location_history, saved_places, danger_zones, academies — none have CHECK constraints on coordinate range.
issues.fix_hint: Add CHECK constraints in a defense-in-depth migration.

issues.title: location_history has no retention/TTL
issues.description: No migration creates a delete-old-rows job; old trails accumulate indefinitely.
issues.fix_hint: Add pg_cron job to delete rows older than 90 days.

issues.title: danger_zones.radius_m has no CHECK on bounds
issues.description: No range check; a zero or huge radius is accepted.
issues.fix_hint: CHECK (radius_m BETWEEN 10 AND 5000).

issues.title: ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION requested without rationale UI
issues.description: Play Store guidance recommends an in-app rationale before the system dialog. Currently the dialog appears directly on first launch.
issues.fix_hint: Show a permission-rationale screen before invoking the system dialog.

issues.title: 11 mocked Playwright tests quarantined via test.fixme (tech debt)
issues.description: 10 subscription-flow tests depend on removed hyeni-mock-db-v1 localStorage backend; 1 force-ring-realtime test needs Realtime mock fixture. Source comment at tests/e2e/subscription-flow.spec.js:502-509.
issues.fix_hint: Migrate to page.route interceptors. Track as backlog; not blocking.

issues.title: Vite warns on dynamic-vs-static import duplication for auth.js + @capacitor/core
issues.description: Visible during real-services preview build. Means those modules will not be code-split. Cosmetic chunk-size hint.
issues.fix_hint: Resolve auth.js imports to one mode (static everywhere). Same for @capacitor/core.

issues.title: Role card chevron contrast 2.88 (decorative)
issues.description: 22px chevron is below 4.5 AA but purely decorative; whole card is clickable.
issues.fix_hint: aria-hidden='true', or swap color to var(--fg-tertiary).

issues.title: .hyeni-v5-kid-chev uses font-weight 400 (only literal 400 in codebase)
issues.description: Spec hard rule forbids 400 for body. This is a decorative chevron, not body text, but ignores the token system.
issues.fix_hint: Change to font-weight: var(--weight-medium); opacity 0.55 already attenuates visual weight.

issues.title: google-services.json Firebase API key tracked in git
issues.description: Acceptable by design but verify Firebase Console restricts key by package + SHA-1.
issues.fix_hint: Manual verification in Firebase Console: API key restrictions.

issues.title: familyId UUID logged in production console
issues.description: [Realtime] log lines include familyId. Low-risk PII trail in logcat.
issues.fix_hint: Strip via esbuild.drop:['console'] config (also addresses QA-P3-01).

issues.title: Set-accumulator refs grow per session with no day-rollover prune
issues.description: firedNotifs, firedExactStatuses, arrivedSet, departedAlerts, academyFocusAlertedRef bounded by event count but no day-rollover prune. Long-running sessions on a kid's device accumulate.
issues.fix_hint: Clear sets at local midnight via a setTimeout to the next 00:00.
